process.title: How we help at every stage
process.subtitle: Click a stage to learn how our services support your treatment process from start to finish.
process.hint: Click a treatment stage above to see how we can help.

influent.label: Influent & Screening
influent.description: Raw wastewater enters the plant through collection systems and passes through bar screens to remove large debris.
influent.details: We help optimize screening operations, assess influent loading variability, and design monitoring plans to protect downstream processes. Our compliance reviews ensure your screening and sampling meets regulatory requirements.

primary.label: Primary Treatment
primary.description: Wastewater flows into sedimentation basins where solids settle and scum is skimmed from the surface.
primary.details: Our startup support and commissioning services validate primary clarifier mechanics, sludge collection, and flow distribution. We troubleshoot settling issues and tune chemical dosing for better solids removal.

biological.label: Biological Treatment
biological.description: Microorganisms break down organic matter in aerated basins using activated sludge, MBBR, SBR, or similar processes.
biological.details: This is the heart of the plant, and our core strength. We optimize aeration, nutrient dosing, and biomass health. Our team troubleshoots bulking, foaming, and nitrification upsets, and provides hands-on operator training for biological process control.

secondary.label: Secondary Clarification
secondary.description: Mixed liquor flows to final clarifiers where treated solids settle, producing clear effluent and return activated sludge.
secondary.details: We assess clarifier hydraulics, solids loading, and sludge settling characteristics. Our commissioning support ensures weir leveling, skimmer operation, and RAS flow control are dialed in for peak performance.

tertiary.label: Tertiary & Disinfection
tertiary.description: Polishing steps such as filtration, UV disinfection, or chemical dosing remove remaining contaminants before discharge.
tertiary.details: Our team validates disinfection system performance, optimizes chemical dosing, and verifies effluent quality through rigorous testing. We provide troubleshooting for filtration breakthrough and disinfection byproduct issues.

effluent.label: Effluent & Sludge Handling
effluent.description: Treated water is discharged or reused, while sludge is digested, dewatered, and hauled away for beneficial use or disposal.
effluent.details: We support compliance reporting and effluent monitoring programs. Our process optimization work extends to sludge handling — from digester health to polymer dosing optimization — reducing hauling costs and improving biosolids quality.
